headline.purpose: Page titles. Top of the scale — no hero display type.

title.purpose: Report/detail header titles and major section heads.

body.purpose: Default UI text, table cells, descriptions.

label.purpose: Field labels, badges, meta, table headers.

shadows.name: panel-float
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, popovers, the committee combobox list (Tailwind shadow-lg).

shadows.name: modal-lift
shadows.purpose: Dialog/modal cards over the bg-black/40 scrim (Tailwind shadow-xl).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, open/close).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Most UI state transitions; users are in flow.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary affirmative action. Solid green, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #00704A; color: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font: 600 0.875rem 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00704A; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #F1F5F9; color: #94A3B8; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action / button-styled link (e.g. ดูรายงาน).
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: #fff; color: #00704A; border: 1px solid #00704A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font: 500 0.75rem 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(0,112,74,0.05); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00704A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive / irreversible action (create-overwrite, reset, delete). Light-red, paired with a confirm step.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #FEF2F2; color: #B91C1C; border: 1px solid #FECACA; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font: 600 0.875rem 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #FEE2E2; } .ds-btn-danger:disabled { background: #F1F5F9; color: #94A3B8; border-color: #CBD5E1; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text/date/select field. Border shifts green on focus, no glow.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="เลือกหรือพิมพ์ชื่อ-นามสกุล" />
components.css: .ds-input { background: #fff; color: #0F172A; border: 1px solid #CBD5E1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font: 400 0.875rem 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748B; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #00704A; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. White on mint-cream, hairline border, flat at rest.
components.html:
รายละเอียดการทวนสอบ

มีรายวิชาที่รับผิดชอบสอนในหลักสูตร 12 รายวิชา
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.25rem; color: #0F172A; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font: 600 1rem 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #1E293B; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0.5rem 0 0; font: 400 0.875rem 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #475569; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Read-only state indicator (offering status, rubric band). Tonal fill + strong text, always with a Thai label.
components.html: ดีเยี่ยม ปรับปรุง ดี
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; font: 500 0.75rem 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-badge-success { background: #DCFCE7; color: #166534; } .ds-badge-warn { background: #FEF3C7; color: #92400E; } .ds-badge-info { background: #DBEAFE; color: #1E40AF; }

components.name: Nav Tab
components.description: Top-level workspace tab. Green underline + green text on hover/active.
components.html: รายงานการทวนสอบ
components.css: .ds-nav-tab { display: inline-block; color: #475569; padding: 0.75rem 0; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; font: 400 0.875rem 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-tab:hover, .ds-nav-tab[aria-current="page"] { color: #00704A; border-bottom-color: #00704A; }

narrative.overview: The interface of a calm, exacting academic record-keeper. White cards float on a mint-cream canvas; a single Starbucks-green voice marks the actions that matter; every state is spelled out in plain Thai rather than left to color. Faculty open it a few times a semester to do real, consequential work, and it earns trust by getting out of the way and being unambiguous about where each course stands. Density serves the task and familiarity is the goal, not novelty.
keyCharacteristics: One green accent on neutral surfaces; restrained by default.
White cards on a mint-cream page, separated by hairline borders, not shadow.
Thai-first typography in a single family (Sarabun) at a fixed, compact rem scale.
Status is always legible as text + color, never color alone.
Deliberate, confirmable destructive actions (sign-off, regenerate, delete, reset).

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Starbucks Green means 'action or current selection.' If it's not clickable, selected, or a primary heading, it is not green. Decoration uses neutrals or House Green.

rules.name: The Label-Not-Color Rule
rules.body: Every status and band badge carries its Thai label as text. Color reinforces meaning; it never carries meaning alone.

rules.name: The AA Floor Rule
rules.body: Body and label text never go lighter than Ink Subtle (#64748B) on white/mint. slate-400 and lighter are prohibited for text, placeholders included.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: No tiny uppercase tracked kickers. Thai is caseless and the register is a task tool; labels are sentence-case Thai at normal tracking.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Sizes are fixed rem, never fluid clamp(). The same control must look identical in a sidebar and a full-width page.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If a surface sits in the page flow (card, table, panel), it gets a border and no shadow. Shadow appears only on overlays (modals, dropdowns).

dos: Do keep Starbucks Green (#00704A) for actions, selection, and primary headings only; carry decoration in neutrals or House Green.
Do float white cards on the Mint Cream (#F1F6F3) page and separate them with 1px slate-200 borders; reserve shadow for modals and dropdowns.
Do pair every status/band badge with its Thai label; color only reinforces it.
Do keep body and label text at Ink Subtle (#64748B) or darker on white; verify 4.5:1.
Do make destructive/irreversible actions deliberate: light-red styling plus a confirm step (type-to-confirm for create/delete).
Do use one family (Sarabun) at a fixed rem scale; contrast via weight and size.
donts: Don't regress toward the cluttered legacy university portal: tiny gray-on-gray tables, no hierarchy, everything the same weight.
Don't add playful consumer-SaaS decoration: blobs, mascots, emoji, gradient fills.
Don't bring flashy marketing-landing energy: hero animation, oversized fluid display type, scroll choreography, or gradient text (background-clip: text is banned).
Don't build over-decorated dashboards: gradient stat cards, neon charts, or glassmorphism.
Don't use a colored border-left/border-right stripe as an accent on cards, list items, or alerts; use a full border or a tint fill.
Don't put a resting drop-shadow on content cards, or use color alone to signal status.
Don't use uppercase tracked eyebrow kickers above sections, or fluid clamp() heading sizes.
